series_metadata.series_title: Ohio State Highway Patrol (OSHP) Auxiliary Unit Member Files
series_metadata.series_description: This record series contains auxiliary member records of service with OSHP and includes: applications/resumes and supporting documentation; liability release waivers; member commissions and auxiliary general orders; merit and service awards, commendations, and letters of recognition; documentation of any violations of Auxiliary General Orders or Division policy; physical fitness evaluations; record of issued uniforms and equipment and other miscellaneous documents, e.g. emergency contact information. Note: The following auxiliary member records are retained separately: Pre-service backgrounds in accordance with SAN 760-0788; pre-service polygraphs are retained in accordance with 760-0773; weapon familiarization in accordance with SAN 760-1480; and training records in accordance with SAN 760-1538.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Electronic: entire period of service two (2) years. ; Paper: entire period of service two (2) years
